nasb.text: I declare to you today that you shall surely perish. You will not prolong your days in the land where you are crossing the Jordan to enter and possess it.

esv.text: I declare to you today, that you shall surely perish. You shall not live long in the land that you are going over the Jordan to enter and possess.

cnv.text: 我今日鄭重地告訴你們，你們必要滅亡；在你過約旦河，進去得為業的地上，你的年日必不長久。

ccb.text: 我今天警告你们，你们必定灭亡，在约旦河对岸——你们将要占领的土地上无法长久。
